creator: ddg01nb@duck.com
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #2)

The symptom of C-h h freeze is that Emacs becomes totally unusable (no response to keyboard and pointer) while TOP shows it consume 100% of a CPU core.  

I notice that you have your builds with OTF turned off and GTK3 turned on.  All my builds with C-h h freezing problem are built with OTF turned on. It suggests that we may need to investigate. I'll build one with your build options to see if the C-h h freezing problem remains on my side. 

Thanks, 
LKG.
